v2 gap: Azure VNet subnets created after March 31 2026 default to private (defaultOutboundAccess=false), blocking outbound internet access unless an explicit outbound method is configured (NAT Gateway, Azure Firewall, or Load Balancer with outbound rules). This enforces NS-2 private network access controls at the subnet level by default. Existing subnets and VNets created before March 31 2026 retain prior behavior. Customer action: configure explicit outbound method if internet egress required. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-network/ip-services/default-outbound-access | Q2-D WebSearch June 2026 confirmed GA March 31 2026.
